description:
Gl/wlw | ✿commoner florist who happeneds to meet a duchess✿

For serval years Avery has been trying to establish herself in the village with little to no success, hearing from the villagefolk that a duchess herself is making an appearance gave a very a sparkle of hope that her business would finally pop off

Uhh yeah, setting is 1850 so I woudknt recommend using modern tech (you can tho-)

Also please review so I know how to make my bots better!
